page.name: Zoho-Voice
page.author: un75978986562673019r72id
page.content:
The Ultimate Practice Management Software

Meet Zoho Practice, the complete practice management software that streamlines accountant workflows for enhanced efficiency, collaboration, growth, and exceptional client service.

Global Acclaim by Accounting Professionals

"Zoho Practice is a complete solution that simplifies a CA firm's day-to-day operations, equipping them with the insights needed to provide exemplary services, and helping them manage their team efficiently."

CA Sanjib Sanghi
Partner at S.SANGHI & CO

Consolidate your practice into one platform

Centralize client management, foster real-time collaboration, minimize manual work, ensure timely compliance, and streamline your client's accounting and bookkeeping all in one platform — Zoho Practice.

  • Centralised client management: Seamlessly onboard new clients, import your existing clients, and manage comprehensive records of client information, cultivating extended client relationships on a unified platform.
  • Unified document repository: Store, retrieve, and manage all client-related documents like contracts, invoices, and financial papers in a secured environment.
  • Streamlined task handling: Easily create tasks for select clients. Assign sub-accountants to handle specific accounting tasks, set reminders, track progress and categorize them based on client projects and priorities, ensuring clarity in task organization.
  • Real-time client collaboration: Interact directly with clients through live chat, send emails, collect documents, and address their concerns promptly. Connect dedicated staff members with individual clients to foster deeper collaboration and enhance overall service quality.
  • Clients insights and books review: Dive deep into your client's books to analyze their financial performance. Detect and rectify discrepancies in client data, ensuring a transparent view of their financial status, and making data-driven decisions to grow the business.
  • Timesheets and billing: Never miss a billable moment. Our streamlined timesheets are designed for efficiency, ensuring every billable moment is accounted for and reflected in your revenue.

Choose Zoho Practice

Every accounting professional deserves a solution as dedicated as they are. A unified practice solution helps lighten the load.

Integrations

The Zoho Finance ecosystem

Seamlessly manage your clients with Zoho Practice and enjoy the benefits of a fully integrated Zoho Finance ecosystem.

  • Streamline accounting and bookkeeping processes by centralizing client data in Zoho Books.
  • Manage payruns with Zoho Payroll.
  • Monitor expenses with Zoho Expense.

Timely compliance alerts

Gain a 360-degree view of client data and deadlines, and receive timely notifications for tax filing.

  • Receive compliance alerts and file taxes promptly.
  • Plan accurate business forecast with real-time financial insights.
  • Stay updated and avoid last-minute hassles with our client dashboard and Receive compliance alerts.

Remote efficiency with Zoho Practice

  • Eliminate the need for on-site visits and manage client portfolios anywhere, anytime.
  • Enable a flexible work environment; your team can deliver quality service from any location.
  • Save time and reduce costs, driving productivity without compromising service quality.

Zoho Finance Partnership

Become a valued consulting partner of Zoho Finance applications and open doors to partnerships, networking, and business advancement.

Join our Program

Frequently Asked Questions

  • How can Zoho Practice help you simplify your business processes?
  • Why use accounting practice management software for your accounting firm?
  • Can Zoho Practice generate tax reports required by tax authorities?

  2. Work Tracking: Efficiently track the progress of tasks and projects.
  3. Global Collaboration: Collaborate seamlessly with teams worldwide.
  4. Gantt Charts: Visualize project timelines using Gantt charts to monitor tasks and dependencies.
  5. Time Tracking: Log billable and non-billable hours with timesheets and automate invoice generation.
  6. Task Automation: Streamline workflows by automating routine tasks.
  7. Customization: Customize projects to fit your specific needs.
  8. Integration: Easily integrate with other Zoho apps and third-party applications for added functionality.

Zoho Projects has received positive reviews, including being praised for its feature-rich project management capabilities. It helps teams work efficiently, save time, and adapt to remote work scenarios.

page.content:
https://practice.zoho.com/home The Ultimate Practice Management Software - Zoho Practice

The Ultimate Practice Management Software

Meet Zoho Practice, the complete practice management software that streamlines accountant workflows for enhanced efficiency, collaboration, growth, and exceptional client service.

Access Zoho Practice

Request a demo

Free Webinar

Getting started with Zoho Practice

Every Wednesday, Time: 3:00 PM IST

Register Now

Practice Dashboard

[widget1][widget2][widget3][widget4]

Global Acclaim by Accounting Professionals

"Zoho Practice is a complete solution that simplifies a CA firm's day-to-day operations, equipping them with the insights needed to provide exemplary services, and helping them manage their team efficiently."

CA Sanjib Sanghi
Partner at S.SANGHI & CO

Consolidate your practice into one platform

Centralize client management, foster real-time collaboration, minimize manual work, ensure timely compliance, and streamline your client's accounting and bookkeeping all in one platform — Zoho Practice.

  • Centralised client management: Seamlessly onboard new clients, import your existing clients, and manage comprehensive records of client information, cultivating extended client relationships on a unified platform.
  • Unified document repository: Store, retrieve, and manage all client-related documents like contracts, invoices, and financial papers in a secured environment.
  • Streamlined task handling: Easily create tasks for select clients. Assign sub-accountants to handle specific accounting tasks, set reminders, track progress and categorize them based on client projects and priorities, ensuring clarity in task organization.
  • Real-time client collaboration: Interact directly with clients through live chat, send emails, collect documents, and address their concerns promptly. Connect dedicated staff members with individual clients to foster deeper collaboration and enhance overall service quality.
  • Clients insights and books review: Dive deep into your client's books to analyze their financial performance. Detect and rectify discrepancies in client data, ensuring a transparent view of their financial status, and making data-driven decisions to grow the business.
  • Timesheets and billing: Never miss a billable moment. Our streamlined timesheets are designed for efficiency, ensuring every billable moment is accounted for and reflected in your revenue.

Choose Zoho Practice

Every accounting professional deserves a solution as dedicated as they are. A unified practice solution helps lighten the load.

Access Zoho Practice

Integrations

The Zoho Finance ecosystem

Seamlessly manage your clients with Zoho Practice and enjoy the benefits of a fully integrated Zoho Finance ecosystem.

  • Streamline accounting and bookkeeping processes by centralizing client data in Zoho Books.
  • Manage payruns with Zoho Payroll.
  • Monitor expenses with Zoho Expense.

Timely compliance alerts

Gain a 360-degree view of client data and deadlines, and receive timely notifications for tax filing.

  • Receive compliance alerts and file taxes promptly.
  • Plan accurate business forecast with real-time financial insights.
  • Stay updated and avoid last-minute hassles with our client dashboard and Receive compliance alerts.

Remote efficiency with Zoho Practice

  • Eliminate the need for on-site visits and manage client portfolios anywhere, anytime.
  • Enable a flexible work environment; your team can deliver quality service from any location.
  • Save time and reduce costs, driving productivity without compromising service quality.

Zoho Finance Partnership

Become a valued consulting partner of Zoho Finance applications and open doors to partnerships, networking, and business advancement.

Join our Program

Frequently Asked Questions

  • How can Zoho Practice help you simplify your business processes?
  • Why use accounting practice management software for your accounting firm?
  • Can Zoho Practice generate tax reports required by tax authorities?

page.author: un75978986562673019r72id
page.content:
Tango Interactive Walkthrough Tool Summary

Tango Interactive Walkthrough Tool - Internal Wiki Summary

Overview

Tango is a tool designed to create interactive walkthroughs for websites or browser apps. It enables users to document processes easily, without the need for coding or complex flow builders.

Key Features

1. Capture Any Process

  • Functionality: Document steps for any website or browser app while working.
  • Ease of Use: Zero code requirement and no complicated flow builders.

2. Protect Sensitive Information

  • Secure Blur Tool: Blurs sensitive personal, customer, and company data in text and images with one click.

3. Share & Export Options

  • Methods of Sharing: Via link, embedding into a website or knowledge base, copying HTML to another document, or exporting as PDF.
  • Share Options: Tango provides options like Copy Link and Embed.

4. Get Guidance

  • Step-by-Step Guidance: Provides on-screen guidance with context and insights.
  • Features: Highlights the screen, shows where to click, pops up automatically, and displays curated insights for each step.

5. Measure & Optimize

  • Crowdsource Insights: Collect user comments and reactions to curate context and tips.
  • Personalize Training: Targeted help based on user dashboard progress.
  • Show Impact: Customizable reports to view and showcase reach and usage.

6. Integration

  • Compatible Tools: Integrates with tools like Microsoft Share, Adobe Acrobat, Microsoft Word, Slack, Notion, Microsoft Office, Jira, Dropbox, and Zendesk.

7. Collaboration

  • Team Workspace: Create, edit, and optimize together in a shared workspace.

Getting Started

  • Availability: Free to start.
  • Installation: Install the free extension.

Additional Notes

Tango promotes efficiency, stating, "Tango is totally free. Just like your time will be. 😉"

Conclusion

Tango offers a comprehensive, user-friendly solution for creating interactive walkthroughs, protecting sensitive information, and optimizing training and insights, all with robust integration and collaboration features.

Learn more about Tango features here.

This summary is for internal use within SRVGROUP.CO. For more detailed information or assistance, contact us at INFO@SRVGROUP.CO.

Zoho CRM Overview

 

Zoho CRM: Empowering Businesses with Advanced Sales Automation

Zoho CRM stands as a visionary leader in the 2023 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Sales Force Automation Platforms, trusted by over 250,000 businesses worldwide. It's recognized not just for its innovative approach but also for its practical impact on business growth and productivity.

Overview

Zoho CRM is an all-in-one platform that revolutionizes customer relationship management. It equips businesses with robust automation, comprehensive analytics, personalized solutions, and more, making it the fastest implementation in the enterprise CRM market.

Key Benefits

  • Enhanced Customer Engagement: With features like omni-channel presence, segmentation, KPIs, and predictive intelligence, Zoho CRM helps businesses craft personalized experiences to foster customer loyalty.
  • Streamlined Operations: Automate workflows, processes, and customer journeys, allowing businesses to focus on growth and reduce repetitive tasks.
  • Data-Driven Decisions: Advanced analytics tools provide actionable insights, custom reports, and real-time operations tracking to sustain business growth.
  • Customization and Ease of Use: Manage and customize Zoho CRM effortlessly, with a dedicated admin panel and a powerful developer platform for extending functionalities.

Recognitions

  • Winner with the highest score in CRM Watchlist 2022: Acknowledging its effectiveness and customer satisfaction.
  • Success Stories: Enterprises like Packshot Creator and Rablab have transformed their productivity and business operations using Zoho CRM.

Choosing Zoho CRM

  • User-Friendly: Refreshingly simple to use, it offers migration, deployment, and training support.
  • Flexibility and Customization: Tailor the CRM to unique business needs and integrate seamlessly with over 800+ apps.
  • Transparent Pricing: No hidden costs, flexible contracts, and best-deal price protection.
  • Security and Compliance: Adheres to the latest standards, ensuring data safety and privacy.

Zoho CRM, with its blend of functionality, customization, and user-centric design, is an ideal choice for businesses looking to optimize their sales processes and build lasting customer relationships. It stands out as a comprehensive CRM solution, ensuring faster deployment, customization, and support for diverse business needs.

Access Zoho CRM

page.name: SRV-----ITIN-Module-Details
page.author: un75978986562673019r72id
page.content:
SRV ITIN Module Overview

The SRV ITIN module is a sophisticated system tailored for managing Individual Tax Identification Number (ITIN) processes, featuring versatile layouts, field configurations, and record locking mechanisms.

Key Features

  • Layouts and Fields:
    • Two primary layouts: 'Standard' and 'ITIN COA ONLY'.
    • Shared with Administrators, Standard users, and others.
    • Various data types including Single Line, Pick List, Boolean, etc.
    • Crucial fields like Address, Agreement Status, ITIN Details, etc.
  • Record Locking Configuration:
    • Manual and automatic record locking based on user permissions and criteria.
    • Locked records limit editing and deleting but allow certain field modifications.
  • Links and Buttons:
    • Customized buttons and links like 'ITIN MERGE DOC', 'COA FORM', and 'ITIN WIKI'.
  • Module Customization and Automation:
    • Module Name: SRV- ITINs and SRV- ITIN.
    • Customization includes various fields, buttons, links, and subforms.
    • Automation features: workflows, approvals, and templates.
  • Module Access and Permissions:
    • Accessible to different user profiles including Administrators and Standard users.
    • Includes layouts and subforms for comprehensive application management.

This module ensures a structured and efficient approach to managing ITIN applications, fostering compliance and streamlined operations in tax-related matters.

page.name: SRV-----ITINs-Blueprint
page.author: un75978986562673019r72id

page.name: SRV-----ITINs-Blueprint-Steps
page.author: un75978986562673019r72id
page.content:
ITIN Process Guide

General Overview of ITIN

Understand ITIN's role in tax processing for individuals without a Social Security Number. Essential for non-residents with U.S. tax obligations.

Initial Phase

Set up a contact profile, verify necessary documents and payment. Aim for completion in less than 1 hour.

Confirm Details

Input or verify client details accurately. Check name, DOB, address, passport details, and date of entry to avoid delays.

Complete Intake

Ensure all relevant information and documents are submitted and correct before proceeding.

Transfer to Tax Documents

Align ITIN information with relevant tax documents. Review and prepare documents for the next phase.

Print

Prepare documents for printing using the merge template on the details page. Ensure all documents are signed.

Approvals

Obtain final document approval from an approval manager before proceeding to the next step.

Approved / Not Approved

  • If approved, inform the client via email that their ITIN application is in process.
  • If not approved, return to the review phase for corrections.

Mail

Prepare and mail the ITIN application to the IRS one day before the alert message is scheduled to be sent.

Close

Update status to 'Close Mailed' once the application is sent. Monitor for IRS response.

Rejected / Reopened

If rejected, update to 'Reopened', investigate and address rejection reasons.

Reprocess

Correct issues based on rejection reasons and reprocess the application.

Cancelled

If corrections are not possible or the client refuses to proceed, update status to 'Cancelled' and close the application.

page.author: un75978986562673019r72id

page.name: ITIN-IN-PROCESS
page.author: un75978986562673019r72id
page.content:
Your ITIN Application - What's Next?


We're pleased to inform you that your ITIN application is now in process!


Here's what you can look forward to once your ITIN arrives:


1. **Business Opportunities**: With your ITIN, you can register your business for an EIN, opening doors to numerous business prospects.

2. **Automotive Registration**: It enables you to legally plate a vehicle in your name.

3. **Financial Flexibility**: Your ITIN is a key to various financial services and opportunities.


Please note, ITINs can take up to 120 days to process. We understand the wait can be long, but we assure you it's a step towards greater opportunities.


**Important**: Your ITIN will arrive in a simple, thin envelope. It's crucial to handle your mail carefully during this period to ensure it does not get accidentally discarded.


If you haven't received your ITIN within the expected timeframe, don't worry. Contact us immediately, and we will resubmit your application at no extra cost. We're committed to working alongside you and the IRS until you have your ITIN.


Once you have your ITIN, feel free to visit us to proceed with your business registration or any other services you might need.


Thank you for choosing us for your ITIN processing. If you have any questions or need assistance, we're just an email or phone call away.


Servicios Rice-Velasquez Tax & Multiservice

Phone: 833-203-6789

Email: info@srvgroup.co


- SRV Team

Su Solicitud de ITIN - ¿Qué Sigue?


¡Nos complace informarle que su solicitud de ITIN está en proceso!


Esto es lo que puede esperar una vez que llegue su ITIN:


1. **Oportunidades de Negocio**: Con su ITIN, podrá registrar su negocio para obtener un EIN, abriendo puertas a numerosas perspectivas empresariales.

2. **Registro de Vehículos**: Le permite legalmente poner placas a un vehículo a su nombre.

3. **Flexibilidad Financiera**: Su ITIN es la clave para acceder a diversos servicios y oportunidades financieras.


Tenga en cuenta que los ITIN pueden tardar hasta 120 días en procesarse. Entendemos que la espera puede ser larga, pero le aseguramos que es un paso hacia mayores oportunidades.


**Importante**: Su ITIN llegará en un sobre sencillo y delgado. Es crucial manejar su correo con cuidado durante este período para asegurarse de que no se deseche accidentalmente.


Si no ha recibido su ITIN dentro del plazo esperado, no se preocupe. Contáctenos inmediatamente, y volveremos a enviar su solicitud sin costo adicional. Estamos comprometidos a trabajar junto a usted y el IRS hasta que tenga su ITIN.


Una vez que tenga su ITIN, no dude en visitarnos para proceder con el registro de su negocio o cualquier otro servicio que pueda necesitar.


Gracias por elegirnos para el procesamiento de su ITIN. Si tiene alguna pregunta o necesita asistencia, estamos a solo un correo electrónico o llamada de distancia.


Servicios Rice-Velasquez Tax & Multiservice

Teléfono: 833-203-6789

Correo electrónico: info@srvgroup.co


- Equipo SRV

page.name: ITIN-Received
page.author: un75978986562673019r72id
page.content:
¡Su ITIN ha llegado - Abre puertas a nuevas oportunidades!

¡Estamos encantados de informarle que su Número de Identificación Personal del Contribuyente (ITIN) ha llegado! Si necesita una copia, hemos adjuntado una para su conveniencia. Es importante mantener su ITIN seguro y recomendamos hacer copias adicionales para tener a mano cuando lo necesite. Este número es una llave para numerosas posibilidades como abrir cuentas bancarias, obtener crédito, y mucho m

ás. Ahora que tiene su ITIN descatamos unos obciones que puede aprovochar ahora que tiene su ITIN.


Embárquese en su Travesía Empresarial

Registro de Vehículos


Declaración de Impuestos Anual


Ahora que tiene su ITIN, es el momento perfecto para registrar un negocio. Estamos aquí para ayudarle a registrarse rápidamente, asegurando un inicio suave en su travesía empresarial. ¿Interesado en comenzar el proceso? 


Haga clic aquí.


Sacando su registro del estado y su numero federal of EIN asi también le permite registrar vehículos. Ya sea para uso personal o para su negocio, estamos aquí para simplificar el proceso para usted.


Ya tiene su Federal y Registro con el estado? Puede ajendar su cita una vez para emplacar su carro, estaremos encantados de hacerle el servicio. 


SRV Group: Your Trusted Partner in Business & Personal Services



Es esencial presentar una declaración de impuestos cada año para mantener su ITIN activo. Recuerde reservar el 20% de sus ingresos netos para el impuesto de autónomos, Seguridad Social y Medicare. Mantenga un registro meticuloso de sus gastos empresariales con respaldo de recibos para estar preparado para cualquier escenario de auditoría. Y recuerde, estamos aquí para ayudarle en cada paso del camino.

page.content:
ITIN COA Process Guide

ITIN COA (Change of Address) Process Guide

Step 1: Access the Form

Form URL: COA FORM — SRVGroup.co
This form is available for vendors and should be filled out with accurate information.

Step 2: Fill Out the Form
COA FORM — SRVGroup.co

Complete the fields as described below. All fields are mandatory.

  • Your Name: Enter your full name.
  • Your Email: Provide a valid email address for communication.
  • Your Phone: Input your contact number.
  • ITIN Active Status: Select from 'Active' or 'Inactive'.
  • Applicants Names: Enter the name(s) of the applicant(s).
  • Last Name(s): Input the last name(s) of the applicant(s).
  • ID Document to Certify: Upload the required ID document. File size limit is 20MB.
Step 3: Additional Information

Enter the captcha as shown in the image and use the 'Submit' button to send your form. Use 'Reset' to clear all fields.

Step 4: Payment Process

Payment URL: ITIN-COA Payment
Complete the payment process for the COA service through the provided link.

page.content:
Email Plate Vendor with Record File Vendor for Update in Zoho CRM

Creation Date: January 2, 2024
Created By: Cody Rice-Velasquez
View most recent version
​
​

# Zoho CRM

You should always email vendor from the CRM (Operations) or Books (Accounting) to ensure that the record has all communications documented for reference.

ℹ️ Recommended: For this specific vendor "Essence Consulting" who assist us in processing our plates you can print the plate record to attach to the email for easy reference on their end. DO NOT SHARE ANY OTHER RECORD TYPE NOR DO THIS FOR ANY OTHER VENDOR.

1. From inside the plate record. Click on the menu "3 dots"

2. Click on Print Preview

3. Click on Print and print to pdf or download depending on the options you have.

4. Search for the vendor.

5. Type "Vendor's name"

6. Click on "Vendor"

7. Click on Emails

8. Click on Compose Email

9. Click on Cc

10. Type "INFO@SRVGROUP.CO"

11. Type "Subject del Email "

12. Now write the request, feel free to us zai to craft this email.

13. Attach files if applicable

14. Click on Send

Zoho Social Overview

Zoho Social: Comprehensive Social Media Management

Zoho Social offers a comprehensive suite for managing social media brands effectively. It encompasses a range of features designed to optimize social media presence and engagement.

Key Features

  • Schedule: Features flexible scheduling options to post content when the audience is most active, including custom schedule creation.
  • Calendar: Provides an intuitive content calendar for visualizing and organizing posts.
  • Monitor: Offers a monitoring dashboard with multiple listening columns for real-time engagement.
  • Analytics: Delivers in-depth social analytics to understand audience interactions, with customizable reports.
  • Instagram Integration: Direct scheduling for Instagram, including features for hashtag monitoring and user-generated content reposting.
  • Agency Support: Enables agencies to manage multiple clients with an agency-branded dashboard.

User Testimonials

Users, including Jon Tromans, a Digital Marketing Trainer, and Sheldon Maxwell, a Project & Marketing Manager, praise Zoho Social for its efficiency and comprehensive features.

Mobile App Availability

Zoho Social also offers mobile apps for on-the-go social media management, available on both Appstore and Google Play.

Rating and Trial

The platform is highly rated by customers (4.5/5 and above) and offers a 15-day free trial without requiring a credit card.

For more information on each feature, visit Zoho Social.

page.content:
Custom Solutions with Zoho Flow and Zoho Creator

Unlocking the Power of Custom Solutions

Custom solutions are tailor-made applications designed to meet the unique needs of your business. They empower you to streamline processes, improve efficiency, and drive growth. Two essential tools in creating custom solutions are Zoho Flow and Zoho Creator.

Zoho Flow: Streamlining Automation

Zoho Flow is a powerful automation platform that allows you to connect and automate various apps and services. With Zoho Flow, you can orchestrate workflows, integrate applications, and eliminate manual tasks. It's the key to achieving seamless data flow and communication within your organization.

Zoho Creator: Building Tailored Apps

Zoho Creator is a low-code application development platform that enables you to design and develop custom applications without extensive coding. Create web and mobile apps tailored to your specific requirements. With Zoho Creator, you have the flexibility to build apps that fit your business processes like a glove.

The Power of Integration

When Zoho Flow and Zoho Creator join forces, you unlock the true potential of custom solutions. Automate complex processes, capture and store data efficiently, and access real-time insights. Your business gains agility, productivity, and the ability to adapt to evolving challenges.

Start Building Your Custom Solutions

Whether you need to automate repetitive tasks, create custom applications, or integrate your existing tools, Zoho Flow and Zoho Creator offer the tools you need to succeed. Embrace custom solutions, enhance your business operations, and stay ahead of the competition.

page.content:
Offer personalized recommendations and ensure seamless shopping experience.

Online shopping isn't unidirectional. Multiple options can usually disorient customers and distract them from getting to business. The E-commerce Zobot learns about your website visitors and gives them product suggestions accordingly. This also eliminates the need for online retail business owners, who are not able to manage multiple customer conversations at a time generally, to outsource their customer support to a call center.

https://www.zoho.com/salesiq/downloads/plugins/ecommerce.zip


Bot Requirements:

  • Initiate chat/ Trigger a welcome message.
  • Displays the list of deals and offers available on your online store.
  • Helps visitors choose products from different categories based on their budget.
  • Assists visitors in case they want to return a wrong order/damaged item.
  • Displays the organization's refund policies
  • Shows visitors the statuses of their orders
  • Forward visitor chats to corresponding departments.

Zobot Capabilities:

  • Live Chat Transfer: Your prospects can ask the bot to transfer their chats to one of the support representatives of your organization at any time. The Zobot provides an option to do so inside the chat window itself.
  • Offers Product Suggestions: The Zobot can get your visitors' interests and budgets and display the list of products correspondingly.
  • Keep prospects informed: The Zobot also helps visitors review the status of the products they have ordered on your website and also displays the online store's refund policy on request. It is also capable of notifying visitors about product updates.
  • Makes returns easier: In case your visitor wants to return any of the items that have been ordered, the Zobot gets the pickup location and schedules the return pickup.

Bot flow:


How to create this bot?

  • Navigate to Settings > Zobot > Create bot. Add a name, description, choose the website and preferred departments.
  • Set trigger criteria and enable business hours and operator handoff based on your requirements.
  • Now, copy the code and paste it inside each handler- Trigger, Message, and Context.
  • Save and Publish each handler separately and then publish the bot.

Automatically qualify and generate more leads for your business.

Lead generation ain’t going to be a difficult task anymore! The Lead Generation Zobot knows how to entice visitors hitting your site into buying your products effortlessly.

DOWNLOAD SAMPLE SCRIPTS

Bot Requirements:

  • Initiate chat/ Trigger a welcome message.
  • Displays the list of departments available for support.
  • Schedule meetings/calls using Calendar widgets.
  • Send emails to visitors who want to be notified about updates
  • Forward visitor chats to corresponding departments.

Zobot Capabilities:

It can collect visitor details and connect the visitors on your website to the different departments available inside your organization based on the type of problem they're facing.

  • Live Chat Transfer: Your prospects can ask the bot to transfer their chats to one of the support representatives of your organization at any time. The Zobot provides an option to do so inside the chat window itself.
  • Schedules meetings: The Zobot can get your visitors' company details and preferred time slots and fix meetings for them with operators of your organization.
  • Keep prospects updated: The Zobot captures the prospects' information like name and email address, and based on the requirements, it updates prospects as and when there are updates on the products/services that you offer. The info can be daily property alerts or market statistics on products.

Bot flow:

How to create this bot?

  • Navigate to Settings > Zobot > Create bot. Add a name, description, choose the website and preferred departments.
  • Set trigger criteria and enable business hours and operator handoff based on your requirements.
  • Now, copy the code and paste it inside each handler- Trigger, Message, and Context.
  • Save and Publish each handler separately and then publish the bot.

Schedule appointments and meetings on the go without any human assistance.

The Scheduler Zobot showcases the services available inside the organization and schedules appointments for your clients. This eliminates the need for a personal assistant to keep track of all free slots and booked slots. The Zobot simply collects the visitors details and schedules appointments in a jiffy.

DOWNLOAD SAMPLE SCRIPTS

Bot Requirements:

  • Initiate chat/ Trigger a welcome message.
  • Lists out the services available inside the organization.
  • Schedule appointments/meetings using Calendar widgets.
  • Let visitors chat with representatives in the organization.

Zobot Capabilities:

It can collect visitor details and connect the visitors on your website to the different departments available inside your organization based on the type of problem they're facing.

  • Live Chat Transfer: Your prospects can ask the bot to transfer their chats to one of the support representatives of your organization at any time. The Zobot provides an option to do so inside the chat window itself.
  • Schedules meetings: The Zobot can get your visitors' company details and preferred time slots and fix meetings for them with operators of your organization using the Calendar widget.
  • Keep prospects updated: The Zobot captures the prospects' information like name and email address, and based on the requirements, it updates prospects as and when there are updates on the products/services that you offer. The info can be daily property alerts or market statistics on products.

Bot flow:

How to create this bot?

  • Navigate to Settings > Zobot > Create bot. Add a name, description, choose the website and preferred departments.
  • Set trigger criteria and enable business hours and operator handoff based on your requirements.
  • Now, copy the code and paste it inside each handler- Trigger, Message, and Context.
  • Save and Publish each handler separately and then publish the bot.

Keep your visitors engaged 24/7 with the Q&A Zobot.

Every industry needs someone to answer their Q&A. This conversational assistant can address this with its AI capabilities.

DOWNLOAD SAMPLE SCRIPTS

Bot Requirements:

  • Initiate chat/ Trigger a welcome message.
  • Lists out the services available inside the organization.
  • Schedule appointments/meetings using Calendar widgets.
  • Let visitors chat with representatives in the organization.
  • Create leads inside Zoho CRM
  • Create tickets and check ticket status inside Zoho Desk

Zobot Capabilities:

It can collect visitor details and connect the visitors on your website to the different departments available inside your organization based on the type of problem they're facing.

  • Live Chat Transfer: Your prospects can ask the bot to transfer their chats to one of the support representatives of your organization at any time. The Zobot provides an option to do so inside the chat window itself.
  • Schedules meetings: The Zobot can get your visitors' company details and preferred time slots and fix meetings for them with operators of your organization using the Calendar widget.
  • Keep prospects updated: The Zobot captures the prospects' information like name and email address, and based on the requirements, it updates prospects as and when there are updates on the products/services that you offer. The info can be daily property alerts or market statistics on products.
  • Keeps track of leads: The Zobot captures the prospects' information like name and email address, and creates leads inside Zoho CRM
  • Creates tickets in Desk: The Zobot also creates tickets for customers who are facing issues with any product/service and keeps them informed about the ticket status as well.

Bot flow:

How to create this bot?

  • Navigate to Settings > Zobot > Create bot. Add a name, description, choose the website and preferred departments.
  • Set trigger criteria and enable business hours and operator handoff based on your requirements.
  • Now, copy the code and paste it inside each handler- Trigger, Message, and Context.
  • Save and Publish each handler separately and then publish the bot.

Increase support efficiency with the help desk Zobot

Help desks are responsible for quick resolution of immediate needs and technical issues of end users. This Zobot increases the efficiency of the help desk by helping with feature requests, demo scheduling and connecting visitors to the right operators

DOWNLOAD SAMPLE SCRIPTS

Bot Requirements:

  • Initiate chat/ Trigger a welcome message.
  • Lists the services that are available.
  • Schedule demos using Calendar widgets.
  • Let visitors chat with representatives in the organization.
  • Push visitors who request new features as leads inside Zoho CRM
  • Create tickets for issues inside Zoho Desk

Zobot Capabilities:

It can collect visitor details and connect the visitors on your website to the different departments available inside your organization based on the type of problem they're facing and also schedule product demos.

  • Live Chat Transfer: Your prospects can ask the bot to transfer their chats to one of the support representatives of your organization at any time. The Zobot provides an option to do so inside the chat window itself.
  • Schedules demos: The Zobot can get your visitors' details and preferred time slots and schedule product demos for them with operators of your organization using the Calendar widget.
  • Creates leads in CRM: When visitors request for a new feature, the Zobot captures the prospects' information like name and email address, and creates leads inside Zoho CRM
  • Creates tickets in Desk: The Zobot also creates tickets for customers who are facing issues with any product/service and keeps them informed about the ticket status as well.

Bot flow:

How to create this bot?

  • Navigate to Settings > Zobot > Create bot. Add a name, description, choose the website and preferred departments.
  • Set trigger criteria and enable business hours and operator handoff based on your requirements.
  • Now, copy the code and paste it inside each handler- Trigger, Message, and Context.
  • Save and Publish each handler separately and then publish the bot.

  • Ease course selection and admissions and simplify lead management using Zobots.

    Students these days have a lot of questions about choosing courses that suit their likes and dislikes and they need immediate assistance with respect to this. Assigning a dedicated human staff to address this may not be effective as human resources have certain limitations. This Zobot for educational websites reaches out to students, gives them a wide range of choices based on their requirements, helps them with admissions, gives suggestions about institutions they can choose from, keeps them informed about events and addresses student queries on-the-go. It also helps them connect with representatives of the institutions.

    DOWNLOAD SAMPLE SCRIPTS

    Bot Requirements:

    • Initiate chat/ Trigger a welcome message.
    • Get student qualifications
    • Displays the list of institutions and the courses available to choose from
    • Schedule counseling appointments using Calendar widgets.
    • Send emails to visitors who want to be part of events
    • Forward visitor chats to the representatives of the institution.

    Zobot Capabilities:

    It can collect visitor details and connect the visitors on your website to the different departments available inside your organization based on the type of problem they're facing.

    • Live Chat Transfer: Your prospects can ask the bot to transfer their chats to one of the support representatives of your organization at any time. The Zobot provides an option to do so inside the chat window itself.
    • Schedules meetings: The Zobot can get your visitors' details and preferred time slots and fix counseling appointments for them with representatives.
    • Keep prospects updated: The Zobot captures the prospects' information like name and email address, and based on the requirements, it updates prospects as and when there are updates on the events that you conduct. The info can be about education fairs, course counseling, etc.

    Bot flow:

    How to create this bot?

    • Navigate to Settings > Zobot > Create bot. Add a name, description, choose the website and preferred departments.
    • Set trigger criteria and enable business hours and operator handoff based on your requirements.
    • Now, copy the code and paste it inside each handler- Trigger, Message, and Context.
    • Save and Publish each handler separately and then publish the bot.

    Provide five-star hospitality to your guests and increase business efficiency.

    The Zobot for the hotel industry completely redefines a hotel’s guest experience by engaging your guests in totally unique ways like solving their check-in/out issues. These Zobots can render hyper-personalized recommendations to your guests based on their behavior and preferences. They can also give suggestions about the best restaurants around and help visitors with ordering their food. 

    DOWNLOAD SAMPLE SCRIPTS

    Bot Requirements:

    • Initiate chat/ Trigger a welcome message.
    • Displays the list of hotels available based on visitors' location.
    • Book tables at restaurants for visitors.
    • Help visitors order food online
    • Make hotel reservations for visitors
    • Forward visitor chats to corresponding departments.

    Zobot Capabilities:

    It can collect visitor details, gives them hotel and restaurant suggestions, eases online food ordering and also connects the visitors on your website to the different departments available inside your organization based on their requirements.

    • Live Chat Transfer: Your prospects can ask the bot to transfer their chats to one of the support representatives of your organization at any time. The Zobot provides an option to do so inside the chat window itself.
    • Makes reservations: It makes reservations at hotels and table bookings at restaurants based on visitor preferences and comfort.
    • Schedules meetings: The Zobot can get your visitors' company details and preferred time slots and fix meetings for them with operators of your organization.
    • Keep prospects updated: The Zobot captures the prospects' information like name and email address and based on the requirements, it keeps them informed about offers and festive discounts at hotels.

    Bot flow:

    How to create this bot?

    • Navigate to Settings > Zobot > Create bot. Add a name, description, choose the website and preferred departments.
    • Set trigger criteria and enable business hours and operator handoff based on your requirements.
    • Now, copy the code and paste it inside each handler- Trigger, Message, and Context.
    • Save and Publish each handler separately and then publish the bot.

    • Plugs help you perform customized actions on the codeless bot platforms. To validate, when a visitor visits your website, you can get their email, generate a unique OTP and allow them to proceed further only if the OTP verification is successful.

      Overview of the Plugs:

      We need to generate 2 Plugs : 
      Plug 1 - For generating unique OTP 
      Plug 2 - For verifying the OTP 

      How to create a plug:

      Plug1 - Generating OTP
      • In your SalesIQ Dashboard, navigate to Settings > Developers > Plugs and Click Add.
      • Provide your plug a name, description. Select the Platform as SalesIQ Scripts, and click on Create Plug. 
      • Now, create the Plug 1- generating OTP. Click on the parameters on top and declare the following. 
                  1. Input Parameter - Name : email | Type : Email
                  2. Output Parameter - Name : OTP | Type : Number
      • Copy paste the below code:
      1. response = Map();
      2. email = "";
      3. if(session.containsKey("email"))
      4. {
      5.         email = session.get("email").get("text");
      6.  OTP = randomNumber(1000,9999);
      7. }
      8. response = Map();
      9. response.put("OTP",OTP);
      10. return response;
      • Then, click Save, preview the plug and Publish it.
      Plug 2 - Verifying OTP
      • Create the Plug 2 - verifying the OTP. Click on the parameters on top and declare the following. 
                  1. Input Parameter 1 - Name : emailotp | Type : Number
                  2. Input Parameter 2 - Name : visitorotp | Type : Number
                  3. Output Parameter : - Name : otpstatus | Type : String
      • Copy paste the below code.
      1. response = Map();
      2. emailotp = "";
      3. visitorotp = "";
      4. emailotp1 = session.get("emailotp").get("value");
      5. visitorotp1 = session.get("visitorotp").get("value");
      6. if(emailotp1 == visitorotp1)
      7. {
      8.  otp_status = "OTP verification is Successful";
      9. }
      10. response = Map();
      11. response.put("otpstatus",otp_status);
      12. return response;
      • Then, click Save, preview the plug and Publish it. Now, we have added Plug. 
      Note : Only published Plugs will be listed in Codeless Bot Builder. 

      Flow to verify OTP on the Codeless Bot platform: 
      1. Initially get the email from the visitor,
      2. Generate a unique OTP using Plug 1,
      3. Send the generated OTP by send mail block, 
      4. Then get the OTP from the visitor by visitor fields block,
      5. Verify the both OTP (visitor given OTP and plug generated OTP) using Plug 2,
      6. If the OTP verification is successful proceed to the flow, if not, ask the OTP again. 

      How to incorporate Plugs in Codeless bot?
      • Navigate to Settings > Bot >Add, enter the necessary information and select Codeless Bot as bot platform or open an existing bot.
      • Select the Plugs block under Action Block and select the Plug 1 (Generate OTP)
      • Provide bot context for email as plug input and get the OTP as plug output and store in bot context (emailotp). 
      • Click Save. 

      • Now, with Send email block, send an email to the visitor with OTP got from the Plug 1 using bot context (emailotp). 
      • Next, using the visitor fields block, get the OTP from the visitor and save it using the bot context (visitorotp) to verify. 
      • Then, select Plug 2, to verify the OTP created from Plug 1 (emailotp) and OTP entered by the visitor (visitorotp.)
      • Provide both emailotp and visitorotp as Plug input and get the verification successful text from as Plug output and store it in bot context to use it further. Click Save.


      Related Links:
      • Plugs help guide. 
      • Codeless bot help guide. 
      • Know more about Bot context here. 
      • Plug to create a lead in Zoho CRM.
      • Plug for getting the status of the ticket in Zoho Desk.
      To know more about the features of zobot, kindly visit our Resources Section. 

    Plug Sample #3: Part 2 - Fetch the operators' available slots in Zoho Bookings.

    •  Sasidar Thandapani
    • Announcement
    • 1 year ago

    In earlier post we covered how to design a Codeless bot to schedule an appointment/meeting on Zoho Booking using Plugs. In this post we will learn how to create a plug to fetch the operator's available timings on the visitor's preferred date in Zoho Bookings. Therefore, when scheduling a meeting, the bot initially asks for a preferred date from the visitor and then displays the operator's available slots during that particular day. This helps your organization to manage your operator's schedules and eliminates the clash of bookings/meetings.

    What can this plug do?    
    • Gets the visitor's preferred date.
    • Display the agent's available slots (Zoho Bookings) on the preferred date.
    How to Create this Plugs?
    • In your SalesIQ Dashboard, navigate to Settings > Developers > Plugs > Click on Add .
    • Provide your Plug a name, description, select the Platform as SalesIQ Scripts , and click on Create Plug.  
    • Click on Parameters, provide the following
                 1. Input Parameter 1 : date | Data Type  : Date
                 2. Output Parameters : slots | Data Type : Number list


    Create a connection with Zoho bookings. 
    • Click on Connection at the left bottom. You will be redirected to the connection page.
    • Click on Create connection at the top right corner. Under Default connection , select Zoho OAuth . 

    • Then, give your connection a name, connection link name and choose required scopes.


    • Click on Create And Connect. Upon successful authentication, Zoho Bookings will be connected. Note: The Connection Link Name will be used in scripts to invoke URL tasks.
    • Copy, paste the below code and make the required changes. 
    1. response = Map();
    2. date = "";
    3. date = session.get("date").get("value");
    4. unixDate = date.toDate();
    5. slots = List();
    6. //Zoho Booking "Available Deluge task"
    7. //Ref -  https://www.zoho.com/deluge/help/bookings/get-available-slots.html
    8. //Replace your staff ID and service ID
    9. available_slots = zoho.bookings.getAvailableSlots(4302354000000026055,4302354000000026017,date,"zohobookings");
    10. slots_collect = available_slots.get("response").get("returnvalue").get("data");
    11. for each  slot in slots_collect
    12. {
    13.      unixSlot = unixDate + " " + slot + ":00";
    14.      slots.add(unixSlot.unixEpoch("Asia/Calcutta"));
    15.      response.put("slots",slots);
    16.      info slots;
    17. }
    18. return response;
    • Then, click Save , preview the plug and Publish it.
    How to incorporate Plugs in Codeless bot?
    • Navigate to Settings > Bot > Add , provide the necessary information and select Codeless Bot as bot platform or open an existing bot.
    • Select the Plugs under Action Block and choose the required Plug (Only published plugs will be listed here)
    • Provide the Plug inputs and outputs .
    • In this case, the preferred date from the visitor is collected from the calendar block and stored in bot context (date.option) - Plug input. 
    • Once the plug is executed, it will return the available slots as output which is stored in bot context (slot.option).

    • Then use Slots block to display the available slots to the visitors. Provide the bot context as slots (plug output). 

    Related Links:
    • Plugs help guide. 
    • Codeless bot help guide. 
    • Plugs for OTP verification. 
    • Plug to create a lead in Zoho CRM. 
    • Plug for getting the status of the ticket in Zoho CRM
    To know more about the features of Zobot, kindly visit our Resources Section. 

    Regards,
    Sasidar Thandapani

    Share :
    3 Replies
    Reply

page.name: Zoho-Bookings-Plug-for-Chat
page.author: un75978986562673019r72id
page.content:
Get available slots from Zoho Bookings

Table of Contents

  • Overview
  • Syntax
  • Example
  • Response Format
  • Related Links

Overview

This task is used to fetch a list of available slots for the given service and staff on the specified date.

This task is based on Zoho Bookings API - Fetch Availability.

Syntax

<response> = zoho.bookings.getAvailableSlots(<service_id>, <staff_id>, <date>, <connection>);
ParamsData typeDescription

<response> 

KEY-VALUE

Variable which will hold the returned response.

<service_id> 

NUMBER

The ID of the service whose available slots will be fetched.

Note:

  • You can get the ID of the record from the URL. The URL of a record in the service module is in the following format:
    https://bookings.zoho.com/#/app/manage-business/services/<service_id>/service-info
  • You can also use the invoke URL task to fetch records from the Services module. Visit Zoho Bookings API help and navigate to "Fetch Services" for API details. The response will contain the IDs of all the records, which can be extracted as illustrated in this sample snippet. 
  • You can also use zoho.bookings.getRelatedRecords task to fetch records from Services module and then the IDs of those records can be extracted as illustrated here.

<staff_id>

NUMBER

The ID of the staff associated with the service whose availability will be checked.

Note:

  • You can get the ID of the record from the URL. The URL of a record in staffs module is in the following format:
    ​https://bookings.zoho.com/#/app/manage-business/staffs/<staff_id>/staff-info
  • You can also use the invoke URL task to fetch records from the Staff module. Visit Zoho Bookings API help and navigate to "Fetch Staff" for API details. The response will contain the IDs of all the records, which can be extracted as illustrated in this sample snippet. 
  • You can also use zoho.bookings.getRelatedRecords task to fetch records from Staff module and then the IDs of those records can be extracted as illustrated here.

<date>

TEXT

The date for which the available time slots will be fetched.

<connection>

TEXT

The name of the connection.

Note:

  • In view of stopping new authtoken generation, a Zoho OAuth connection with appropriate scopes is mandatory for new integration tasks (created after the deadline specified in the post) to work as expected. Existing integration tasks will continue to work with or without the connections parameter unless the authtoken is manually deleted from accounts.
  • Add relevant scopes while creating the connection.
  • Refer to this post for the list of Zoho services that support the connections page.
  • Learn more about connections

Example

The following script fetches all the available slots for the service of ID - 3883XXXXXXXXXXX7032 and staff of ID - 3883XXXXXXXXXXX7008 on 18-10-2019:

response = zoho.bookings.getAvailableSlots(3883XXXXXXXXXXX7032, 3883XXXXXXXXXXX7008, "18-10-2019", "bookings_oauth_connection");

where:

response
The variable which holds the response in KEY-VALUE format.
3883XXXXXXXXXXX7032
The NUMBER that represents the service ID.
3883XXXXXXXXXXX7008
The NUMBER that represents the staff ID.
"18-10-2019"
The TEXT that represents the date for which the available slots will be fetched.
"bookings_oauth_connection"
The TEXT that represents the connection name.

Response Format

Success Response

  • The success response will be returned in the following format:
     {
     "response": {
     "returnvalue": {
     "reponse": true,
     "data": [
     "15:15",
     "15:30",
     "15:45",
     "16:00",
     "16:15",
     "16:30",
     "16:45"
     ],
     "time_zone": "Asia/Calcutta"
     },
     "status": "success"
     }
     }

To get the time zone, you can use the following script:

 <variable> = response.get("response").get("returnvalue").get("time_zone");

To extract the list of available slots, you can use the following script:

 <variable> = response.get("response").get("returnvalue").get("data");

Failure Response

  • The failure response for an invalid or non-existent service ID will be returned in the following format:
     {
     "response": {
     "returnvalue": {
     "message": "Service not found",
     "status": "failure"
     },
     "status": "success"
     }
    }
  • The failure response for an invalid or non-existent staff/resource ID will be returned in the following format:
     {
     "response": {
     "returnvalue": {
     "message": "Staff not found",
     "status": "failure"
     },
     "status": "success"
     }
    }

Related Links

  • Zoho Bookings API

page.name: Memory
page.author: un75978986562673019r72id
page.content:
Plug Sample #4: Improve your customer interacting experience by letting Zobot remember your website visitor name! 

  •  Sasidar Thandapani
  • Announcement
  • 1 year ago

Hi Everyone! 

In our Plug sample series, we have another simple yet efficient plug for your Codeless bot builder. Before that, I have a question. Let's say you go to the same coffee shop everyday for your morning coffee. Wouldn't you be happy if the waiter greeted you by your name and remembered what you usually order? Not just you, that would be the case for everyone. And that includes your customers too. 

Similarly, when the visitor lands on your website and your chatbot is greeting them. They might not want to enter their names to the bot every time they visit. So to avoid redundancy you can use the following plug for the Zobot to remember the visitor name and scale-up your customer service experience. Plugs in the Codeless bot are used to create custom functions to achieve customizable actions for your no- code bot. Now let's learn how to create a plug to remember your website visitor name and email address and add it in the chatbot flow built with Codeless bot. 

Note: Remember that the visitor information will be stored only after they agree to the privacy policy. 

What can this Plug do?
  • When a visitor/customer visits your website, they will give their such as name and email. These details will be saved in SalesIQ (Visitor information).  
  • This plug can prevent asking the name when it is already available in visitor info/context variable. 
Note: Learn more about the context variable here. 

How to create this Plug?
  • In your SalesIQ Dashboard, navigate to Settings > Developers > Plugs > Click on Add .
  • Provide your Plug a name, description, select the Platform as SalesIQ Scripts and click on Create Plug.  
  • Click on Parameters, provide the following
  • Input Parameter: name | Data Type: String
  • Output Parameter: message | Data Type: String
 
Copy, paste the below code and make the required changes.
  1. name = "";
  2. name = session.get("name").get("value");
  3. if(name.containsIgnoreCase("Visitor"))
  4. {
  5. }
  6. else
  7. {
  8.  returning_message = "Yes " + name + ", can you please let me know your issue?";
  9. }
  10. response = Map();
  11. response.put("message",returning_message);
  12. return response;
  • Then, click Save, preview the Plug and Publish it.
How to add this Plug in Codeless bot builder?
  • Navigate to Settings > Bot > Add, provide the necessary information, select Codeless Bot as a bot platform, or open an existing bot.
  • Select the Plugs under Action Block and choose the required Plug (Only published plugs will be listed here)
  • Select "Name" in the visitor variable as the Plug input and provide a context variable for the output. 
  • After, click Save. 
Note: The visitor names name will be stored in a context variable. It can be used in other cards to provide more personalization. To avail it, type % and choose "visitor.name". 
​

Working of the Plug in Codeless bot:
 
The Plug has 2 cases, success and failure. 
  • Success case - When the Name is available in the visitor variable (Name = visitor name), the bot will consider the visitor as returning visitor and will not ask the name again. 
  • Failure case - When the name is unavailable (Name = null), the bot will ask the visitor the name. 
 


Related links:
  • Plugs help guide. 
  • Codeless bot help guide. 
  • Plugs for OTP verification. 
  • Plug to create a lead in Zoho CRM. 
  • Plug for getting the status of the ticket in Zoho Desk
  • Plug to schedule appointments in Zoho Bookings
To know more about the features of Zobot, kindly visit our Resources Section.

page.name: maz-potential
page.author: un75978986562673019r72id
page.content:
OpenAI Alert - Plug Sample #6: Reach maximum potential with SalesIQ Zobot and ChatGPT Integration 

  •  Sasidar Thandapani
  • Announcement
  • 10 months ago

In recent times, AI-powered tools have seen a remarkable surge in usage due to their exceptional capacity to enhance overall performance across diverse industries and sectors. One such tool is ChatGPT which businesses have started to use predominantly for multiple purposes. 

ChatGPT is an AI-powered chatbot that can understand natural language and respond to queries in real-time. On the other hand, we already know that SalesIQ's Zobot is an excellent tool to automate customer engagement which helps businesses to engage with their customers and perform actions based on unique business needs. 

By integrating ChatGPT and SalesIQ's Zobot, businesses can create a seamless customer service experience that is not only efficient but also productive. In this post, let's discuss how to integrate ChatGPT with SalesIQ's Zobot ( Codeless bot builder ) using Plugs. For your reference, we have deployed Zobot-ChatGPT integrated bot in the below site. 

Try it yourself


What can this plug do?
  • First plug helps to integrate the GPT model - text-davinci-003 with Zobot using your OpenAI's API key.
  • Second plug helps to integrate the GPT- model 3.5-turbo with Zobot using your OpenAI's API key.
  • Get a response from GPT for any text inputs such as questions/issues from the visitor.
Note : Remember that this script cannot train the GPT models according to your business resource. 

How to create the ChatGPT Plug?

Step 1 - Get API keys from the Open AI
  • Navigate to the OpenAI developer section.
  • Click " Log in " on the top right corner to log in with your account. 
  • If you belong to multiple organization, select your organization. 
  • Finally, click on " Create new secret key " to generate an API key for your account. 


Step 2 - Create the Plug
  • In your SalesIQ Dashboard, navigate to Settings > Developers > Plugs > click on Add .
  • Provide your Plug a name, description, select the Platform as SalesIQ Scripts , and click on Create Plug . 
  • Click on Parameters and provide the following
    • Input Parameter: question | Data Type: String
    • Output Parameter: answer | Data Type: String

  • Copy and paste the below script (text-davinci-003 model or gpt-3.5-turbo) and replace the token with your API key.
Plug script to integrate with GPT - text-davinci-003 model
  1. if(session.containsKey("question"))
  2. {
  3.   question = session.get("question").get("value");
  4. }
  5. token = "Bearer sk-oxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxK";
  6. //replace the token with your API key | token = "Bearer <your API key>";
  7. header = Map();
  8. header.put("Authorization",token);
  9. header.put("Content-Type","application/json");
  10. chatgpt = Collection();
  11. chatgpt = {"model":"text-davinci-003","prompt":question,"temperature":0.9,"max_tokens":250,"top_p":1,"frequency_penalty":0.0,"presence_penalty":0.6,"stop":{" Human:"," AI:"}};
  12. params = Map();
  13. params.put(chatgpt);
  14. response = invokeurl
  15. [
  16.   url :" https://api.openai.com/v1/completions"
  17.   type :POST
  18.   parameters:params.toString()
  19.   headers:header
  20. ];
  21. info response;
  22. answer = response.get("choices").getJSON("text");
  23. info answer;
  24. response = Map();
  25. response.put("answer",answer);
  26. return response;
Plug script to integrate with GPT - gpt-3.5-turbo model
  1. if(session.containsKey("question"))
  2. {
  3.  question = session.get("question").get("value");
  4. }
  5. token = "Bearer sk-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx2";
  6. //replace the token with your API key | token = "Bearer <your API key>";
  7. header = Map();
  8. header.put("Authorization",token);
  9. header.put("Content-Type","application/json");
  10. chatgpt = Collection();
  11. chatgpt = {"model":"gpt-3.5-turbo","messages":{{"role":"user","content":question}},"temperature":0.9,"max_tokens":250,"top_p":1,"frequency_penalty":0.0,"presence_penalty":0.6,"stop":{" Human:"," AI:"}};
  12. params = Map();
  13. params.put(chatgpt);
  14. response = invokeurl
  15. [
  16.  url :"https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions"
  17.  type :POST
  18.  parameters:params.toString()
  19.  headers:header
  20. ];
  21. info response;
  22. answer = response.get("choices").getJSON("message").get("content");
  23. info answer;
  24. response = Map();
  25. response.put("answer",answer);
  26. return response;
  • Click on Save to save the plug. 
  • Test the plug by giving any input.

  • The API response from GPT () will be as below.

  • Finally, click on Publish .
How to incorporate plugs in the Codeless bot builder?
  • Navigate to Settings > Bot > Add , provide the necessary information, and select Codeless Bot as a bot platform or open an existing bot.
  • Select the Plugs under Action Cards and select the required plug (Only published plugs will be listed here).
  • Provide the bot context variables for the plug input (question) and output (answer).

  • In this case, the "visitor.question" is the visitor's input (maybe a question/issue) that is stored in the bot context by the visitor fields card.

  • The plug executes and returns the answer from the GPT response as output (answer) which has to be stored in bot context (gptResponse) for displaying it to the visitors.
  • Click Save. 
  • Then using any input/response cards, display the answer. Type % to list all the dynamic and context variables. 


Heads up:
  • Use a single choice card to display the answer and provide two follow-up actions such as "I've another question" for the visitor to ask another question and "End chat" to end the conversation. 

  • Save the visitor's choice in a bot context and using criteria router , route the flow respectively. 


Related links:
  • Plugs help guide
  • Bot context 
  • Sample plug for OTP verification
  • Sample plug for creating appointments in Zoho Bookings
  • Read and write values/data in a Google sheet
  • Zobot troubleshooting page
To know more about the features of Zobot, kindly visit our  Resources Section.  

Cheers, 
Sasidar Thandapani
